ItacPersonItem.Notes: Teacher of dialectics and moral philosophy at the University of Ferrara. among the founders of the Intrepidi Academy, and Secretary of the same Academy. See his biography by Lorenzo Carpane`, in DBI.
ItacPersonItem.Citation: Lorenza Gianfrancesco and Simone Testa, directed by Jane Everson, Denis Reidy, Lisa Sampson, assisted by Thomas Denman, for the Italian Academies Database project.
